name: Dalradian Resources Inc.
description: Dalradian Resources Inc. is a mineral exploration and development company focused on the acquisition, exploration, and development of precious and base metal assets. The company's flagship project is the Curraghinalt gold project in Northern Ireland, which is one of the highest-grade undeveloped gold deposits in the world. Dalradian is committed to developing the project into a world-class, environmentally responsible mine that delivers significant economic benefits to the local community and region.
